title: Nursery Rhyme. CXXIV. Scholastic.
content:
I love my love with an A, because he's Agreeable.
        I hate him because he's Avaricious.
        He took me to the Sign of the Acorn,
        And treated me with Apples.
        His name's Andrew,
        And he lives at Arlington.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. CXXIV. Scholastic."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
